action.description:
Introduced by Senators Wimberger, James, Dassler-Alfheim, Feyen, Keyeski, Larson, Marklein, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Roys, Smith, Spreitzer and Cabral-Guevara; 
cosponsored by Representatives Zimmerman, Behnke, Allen, Dittrich, Emerson, Kaufert, Madison, Mursau, O'Connor, Sinicki, Steffen, Tusler, Vining and Wichgers
